script: F=/home/azureuser/emily-claude-responder.py; echo '===== Emily allow-list (USER_AAD_ID + YOO_AAD_ID) =====' && grep -E 'USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|BOT_APP_ID|BOT_FROM_ID' $F | head -6; echo; echo '===== AAD IDs in inbound activities =====' && jq -r 'now | (.body|fromjson) | "  type=" + .type + "  conv_type=" + (.conversation.conversationType // "?") + "  from=" + (.from.name // "?") + "  aad=" + (.from.aadObjectId // "-")' /home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/activities.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo; echo '===== Compare with Aixa for reference (known working) =====' && grep -E 'USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py | head -3
